case_title: COREY RENNELL et al VS. LINDA LEVENSON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-14-2009 - JUDGMENT.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY LEVENSON, LINDA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT RENNELL, COREY JUAREZ, BETO PAYNE, WILL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-14-2009 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RENNELL, COREY JUAREZ, BETO PAYNE, WILL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LEVENSON, LINDA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LEVENSON, LINDA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT RENNELL, COREY JUAREZ, BETO PAYNE, WILL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
